## Feature PR

### Goal

What user problem does this feature solve?

### Implementation details

How was this implemented?

### API and type impact

- [ ] Public API changed
- [ ] Types changed
- [ ] No public API or type changes

### Validation

- [ ] `pnpm run lint`
- [ ] `pnpm run typecheck`
- [ ] `pnpm run test`
- [ ] `pnpm run build`

### Documentation

- [ ] Updated docs in `docs/`
- [ ] Not required
